Parameter.name: dirtMossMix
Parameter.description: X * mMaskMap.Red - intensity of the moss\nY * mMaskMap.Blue - intensity of the dirt

Parameter.name: dirtMossTint
Parameter.description: saturate(X + dirtDiffuse) - dirt extra color tint\nsaturate(Y + mossDiffuse) - moss extra color tint\ndiffuseColor *=1 - Z*heightLerp - darkening of the diffuseColor based on mParallaxMap, used in combination with sharpness_gradientPosition_heightIntensity in heightBlend variation

Parameter.name: placeableColorScale
Parameter.description: W>0 - blend XYZ to diffuseColor, usually used for in-game placement color

Parameter.name: porosityBySmoothness
Parameter.description: X - porosityAtZeroRoughness\nY - porosityRoughnessSlope (set it to 0.0 if you don't want darkening)\nporosity = X + roughness * Y;

Parameter.name: checkUV1WetnessSnow
Parameter.description: X > 0 - check uv's for wetness and snow (uv1.x > 0 - wet, snow)

Parameter.name: visibilityCutThreshold
Parameter.description: alpha *= uv2.y > X, (uv2 - third UVSet) - cut alpha-test visibility

Parameter.name: heightMask
Parameter.description: X - [-1.0 ... 1.0] to control the height of the getHeightAboveTerrain getWorldPosition(In) height.

Parameter.name: hideByIndex
Parameter.description: hide sub-mesh with index > X\nY - amount of indexes

Parameter.name: sharpness_gradientPosition_heightIntensity
Parameter.description:
darkening of the diffuseColor based on mParallaxMap, used in combination with dirtMossTint.Z and vertexColor.R
X - sharpness
Y - gradientPosition
Z - heightIntensity

Parameter.name: colorScale
Parameter.description: colorScale[index].rgb - diffuse color information\ncolorScale[index].a - not used

Variations.Variation: // variation that will be used where terarin sampling will be used. #define TERRAIN_VT
// enable the use of a custom bc4 texture for cutting out areas where snow shouldn't be #define CUSTOM_SNOWMASK
//enable the use of vertex paint for height blending. #define HEIGHT_BLEND #define CUSTOM_PARALLAX #define COLOR_SCALE

CodeInjections.CodeInjection: #if defined(CUSTOM_PARALLAX) #define PARALLAX_MAP #define HEIGHT_MAP_TEXTURE mParallaxMap #define HEIGHT_MAP_CHANNEL r #endif
#if defined(PARALLAX_MAP) #if GPU_PROFILE >= GPU_PROFILE_HIGH #define PARALLAX_OCCLUSION_MAPPING #endif #define PARALLAX_MAPPING_NON_SQUARE_TEXTURE #endif #define PARALLAX_MAPPING_REFERENCE_PLANE 0.5
